title: Cycle87 Two-Copy Separator

assistants.text: I will inspect the Cycle87 state, audits, and relevant Cycle86 returns, then choose the shortest bankable proof or counterpacket route with explicit failure points and stop conditions.
The arithmetic margin appears banked; the unresolved issue is geometric validity, especially whether 464 shortening plus the projective census really yields one official GRS affine syndrome line.
The 464 route now looks directly certifiable as a fresh [464,232] GRS construction, avoiding any shortening theorem. A canonical domain digest is fixed; only mu_proj(U) remains unchecked.

8. PRZ notification

PRZ should be notified of a claimed official counterpacket only after:

an explicit separator has passed the exact occupancy threshold;

the 464 wrapper has passed;

an independent verifier has replayed the certificate.

The generic existence theorem is suitable for an internal research update, but not for announcing that the stipulated explicit/public counterpacket has been completed.

10. Stop conditions

Official finite counterpacket: stop successfully as soon as

NQ
y
	тАЛ

>T
line
	тАЛ

Strong advertised certificate: record ╬╝
proj
	тАЛ

(y)тЙд8 if true, but do not require it once exact occupancy passes.

Ninefold collision: do not stop. Complete the occupancy census.

U occupancy failure: cut U only. Search another y in the same 464 construction.

Universal avoidance failure: switch to the 560 package.

Common-jet failure: stop both 464 and 560 and issue a counterpacket.

GRS equivalence, one-line identity, product formula, or transversality failure: stop the entire two-copy route and issue a counterpacket at the first false identity.

Do not switch to 560 because of separator collisions. Fixed padding multiplies every locator evaluation by a common nonzero scalar and leaves the relevant projective class structure unchanged.

Do not claim the full prize theorem merely from the finite counterpacket. The final prize-level reduction and public registry step remain separate.

2. Prize relevance

The result is official-rate and official-threshold relevant. At present it is a structural theorem plus a generic existence theorem, not the stipulated explicit/public official counterpacket and not the full prize theorem.
